Uses of Interface
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.service.CRUDOperations

Packages that use CRUDOperations
Package
Description
co.edu.unbosque.usuario.service
Package containing service classes responsible for handling user authentication and authorization, including generation and validation of JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for secure access to application endpoints and service classes responsible for handling business logic related to user management, including creation, update, deletion of users, login verification, and validation of unique identifiers.
